title: Principal Frontend Developer at DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions:
DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions!
